title: festuca alopecuros var. lanata
intro: Festuca alopecuros var. lanata, also known as Woolly Hairgrass, is a type of flowering grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used for centuries, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Woolly Hairgrass include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe sore throats, and calm digestive issues, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
